title: schizoloma ferulaceum
intro: Schizoloma ferulaceum, also known as Schizoloma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schizoloma ferulaceum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Schizoloma ferulaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
